response.text: Done — the scope shows an eye-diagram analysis on Ref 1 with only Meas 1 to Meas 3 present; Meas 4 to Meas 8 are gone. The main plot is an open eye at about 1.106 Gb/s, with a waveform view below, plus TIE histogram, TIE spectrum, and bathtub plots on the left. The results pane lists Jitter Summary for Meas 1, Period for Meas 2 at about 1.066 ns, and Frequency for Meas 3 at about 1.106 GHz.
